name: Chevening Scholarship
description: UK government's global scholarship programme that funds outstanding emerging leaders to study in the UK. Covers tuition, living costs and travel.
requirements: 2 years work experience, leadership potential, return to home country after study

name: Fulbright Program
description: Prestigious US government exchange program offering grants for graduate study, research and teaching. One of the most competitive scholarships in the world.
requirements: Strong academic record, community involvement, demonstrated leadership

name: Erasmus Mundus
description: EU-funded program offering joint master degrees taught across multiple European universities. Full scholarship including tuition and monthly stipend.
requirements: Bachelor degree in relevant field, motivation letter, two references

name: DAAD Scholarship
description: Germany's largest funding organization offering scholarships for study and research in Germany. Covers tuition fees and living expenses.
requirements: Above average grades, relevant degree, German language skills may help

name: Korean Government Scholarship (KGSP)
description: Full scholarship by the Korean government covering tuition, living allowance, and Korean language training before starting your degree.
requirements: High school diploma, good health, no previous Korean government scholarship

name: Japanese MEXT Scholarship
description: Japanese government scholarship for undergraduate and graduate students. Covers full tuition, accommodation, monthly stipend and travel costs.
requirements: Japanese or English proficiency, good health, recommendation from Japanese embassy

name: Chinese Government Scholarship (CSC)
description: Full scholarship from the Chinese government for international students. Covers tuition, accommodation, medical insurance and living allowance.
requirements: Good health, no criminal record, acceptance from Chinese university

name: Turkish Government Scholarship (Turkiye Burslari)
description: Comprehensive scholarship covering tuition, accommodation, health insurance and monthly stipend at Turkish universities. Very popular among Central Asian students.
requirements: Strong academic record, no previous Turkish scholarship, health insurance

name: Swiss Government Excellence Scholarship
description: Offered by the Swiss Confederation for postgraduate researchers and artists. Prestigious award for outstanding academic achievement.
requirements: PhD research proposal, outstanding academic record, strong references

name: Australia Awards
description: Australian government scholarships for students from developing countries. Full scholarship covering tuition, living costs and return airfare.
requirements: Citizens of eligible countries, leadership potential, development focus

name: Holland Scholarship
description: Scholarship for international students from outside the EEA applying to Dutch universities. Covers partial tuition for bachelor and master programs.
requirements: Non-EEA nationality, first-year bachelor program, strong academic profile

name: Gates Cambridge Scholarship
description: One of the most prestigious international scholarships. Fully funds postgraduate study at Cambridge University. Highly competitive and merit-based.
requirements: Exceptional academic excellence, leadership, Cambridge admission

name: Rhodes Scholarship
description: World's oldest international scholarship funding postgraduate study at Oxford University. Selects scholars based on intellect, character and leadership.
requirements: Outstanding leadership, academic excellence, commitment to service

name: Stanford Knight-Hennessy Scholarship
description: Full funding for graduate study at Stanford University. Builds a community of global leaders through multidisciplinary education.
requirements: Graduate admission to Stanford, leadership potential, civic commitment

name: Aga Khan Foundation Scholarship
description: Scholarships for postgraduate study for students from developing countries who have no other means of financing their education.
requirements: Financial need, academic excellence, community development focus

name: El-Yurt Umidi Foundation
description: Uzbekistan government foundation supporting talented Uzbek students to study at leading foreign universities. Covers full costs of study abroad.
requirements: Uzbek citizen, top university admission, return obligation to Uzbekistan

name: Umid Foundation Scholarship
description: State scholarship program for Uzbek students showing academic excellence. Funds study at top international universities in various fields.
requirements: Uzbek citizenship, excellent academics, study abroad plan

name: Presidential Scholarship of Uzbekistan
description: Highest state scholarship awarded to the most outstanding Uzbek students for study at prestigious universities worldwide.
requirements: Uzbek citizen, excellent academic record, admitted to top 200 world university

name: Schwarzman Scholars
description: One-year master's program at Tsinghua University in Beijing. Designed to prepare future leaders for a world where China plays a central role.
requirements: Leadership experience, academic excellence, global perspective

name: Canada Vanier Graduate Scholarship
description: Attracts and retains world-class doctoral students by offering $50,000 per year for three years. Recognizes leadership and high academic achievement.
requirements: Doctoral research, academic excellence, leadership potential

name: ADB-Japan Scholarship
description: Funded by Japan for citizens of ADB developing member countries. Covers postgraduate study at designated Asian universities.
requirements: Citizen of ADB member country, good academic standing, development focus

name: Finland Government Scholarship
description: Scholarship for doctoral and postdoctoral researchers to study at Finnish universities. Finland is known for world-class education and research.
requirements: Doctoral research project, strong academic record, language skills may be required

name: New Zealand Excellence Award
description: Partial scholarship for international students at New Zealand universities. Recognizes academic excellence and potential for leadership.
requirements: Academic excellence, leadership potential, admitted to NZ university

name: KAIST International Scholarship
description: Full scholarship at one of Asia's top science and technology universities. Covers tuition, dormitory and monthly stipend for outstanding students.
requirements: Strong academic achievement, English proficiency, competitive exam may apply

name: Boren Scholarship
description: Funds US students to study less commonly taught languages in world regions critical to US interests. Includes a service requirement after graduation.
requirements: USA citizen, language study, service requirement after graduation

name: Hubert H. Humphrey Fellowship
description: Non-degree program bringing accomplished mid-career professionals to the US for ten months of academic study and professional development.
requirements: Professional experience, leadership, commitment to public policy

name: Open Society University Network Fellowship
description: Supports students and scholars committed to open society values. Funds study and research across a global network of universities.
requirements: Commitment to open society values, academic potential, strong references

name: ACCA Scholarship
description: Supports students pursuing the globally recognized ACCA qualification in accounting and finance. Opens doors to careers in top financial firms worldwide.
requirements: Pursuing ACCA qualification, strong academic record, finance interest

name: EDC Uzbekistan Scholarship
description: Education Development Center supporting talented Uzbek students with funding for higher education both locally and internationally.
requirements: Uzbek citizenship, academic promise, financial need

name: MIT Presidential Fellowship
description: Highly competitive fellowship at MIT for exceptional graduate students in engineering and science. Full funding plus research stipend.
requirements: Outstanding research, strong references, admission to MIT PhD program
